content.en:
After refining the Ruyi Void Sky Shuttle, Ye Tian began to sort out the other treasures he had obtained from the Yang Lie Lord's Graveyard.

Many of these treasures were also of great help to him, such as some of them were of great help to improve the will rule heaven and earth.

Meanwhile.

In the inner perimeter of the Yang Lie Lord's graveyard, there is a Legendary Lord of the Transcendent Realm who has escaped the time trap.

This Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord is the Legendary Lord of the Ancient Domain Sea, and the First Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord of the Ancient Realm White River Holy Land, the Native Lord.

The strength of the Native Lord is almost invincible in the Legendary Lord of the Transcendence Realm, but he himself did not come here for the first time, he did not buy a place, but after the news of the Yang Lie Lord's graveyard spread, he became interested here, so he came here.

He knew that he needed to go through a time trap from the outer perimeter of the cemetery to the inner perimeter, and only by breaking through the time trap could he enter the inner perimeter.

And so, here he came.

Luckily, he paid the price of a serious injury and managed to break in.

The Native Lord also saw the stone tablet of the Yang Lie Lord, hesitated for a moment, and walked into the cyan palace next to him. 08

But when he entered the cyan palace, he was dumbfounded.

"Where's the treasure?"

In the cyan palace, there is no treasure left.

At the first time, he suspected that Lord Yang Lie was fooling him, but if he thought about it carefully, there was no need for Lord Yang Lie to fool them!

Because, at the moment there are only two possibilities.

The first possibility is that the Time Merchant sent someone in advance and took the treasure here.

Second: A Transcendent Legendary Lord came here and took the treasures here.

But even if someone comes, they can't take all the treasures here!

A person can only take three treasures, and when he enters the cyan palace, he will be told, so he does not believe that anyone can take all the treasures here.

Soon.

The Native Lord revealed the news, saying that there was no treasure inside the Yang Lie Lord and that he had been taken away.

When this news broke, no one believed the Native Lord, but thought that it was the Native Lord who wanted to monopolize the treasure.

So, they were even more frantic to break into the interior of the Sun Flame Lord's cemetery.

After a long time, other Transcendental Realm Legendary Lords finally passed the time trap with the help of some secret treasures, and also saw the cyan palace, and naturally found the empty cyan palace.

It was only after a while that people believed that the treasures inside the Yang Lie Lord had been gone.

The original lord of the city was targeted, and some people thought he did it.

And Ye Tian was also targeted, because a legendary lord saw Ye Touyi Yang Lie Lord coming out inside.

Of course, there are also those who question the time firm.

The reputation of the Time Merchant is good, but it does not mean that all the Legendary Lords in the Time Merchant or the Legendary Realm Lords have a good reputation.

In terms of the True No Holy Land, it was announced to the public that Ye Tian had only taken three items, and there were not many items in it.

Although this was a lie that Ye Tiantuo really said without saintliness, each Legendary Lord could indeed only take three items, and there were also Transcendental Realm Lords who tried to study the prohibition of the cyan palace, thinking that under the Legendary Realm Lord, no one could violate this rule.

Therefore, many people believe that Ye Tian only took three items.

Maybe there weren't many items in the cyan palace, Ye Tian took three pieces, and the Native Lord took three pieces.

If this is the case, then it is very likely that the time river bead is on Ye Tian.

......

"I still can't avoid being targeted!"

Ye Tian sighed.

The outside world thinks that he has a time bead on him, and the key is that he really has a time bead on him.

Of course.

Just a time river bead is not enough to let other strong people invade the True No Holy Land to take away the time river bead on his body, and others can only envy him, or find the right opportunity to attack him.

In order to ensure the safety of his relatives, Ye Tian took his relatives to an immeasurable island in the True Infinite Holy Land to cultivate.

Now, he is barely one of the high-level leaders of the True Saintless Land, so he still has this right.

Therefore, even if there is a strong person who is shameless and raids the Dark Forbidden Domain of the Source Sea, he will not panic anything.

In fact, in the uncertain time, Hezhu and other treasures were on Ye Tian's body, and no one dared to directly attack one of his bodies, so there was no need.

Time passed slowly, and the matter of the Yang Lie Lord's graveyard gradually subsided, and the Primordial Lord and Endless Lord Ye Tian were famous, especially Ye Tian, a half-step Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord, who was able to break through the Immortal Dragon Rock Fire Sea and the Time Trap when he had not entered the Transcendent Realm Lord.

Therefore, Ye Tian is more concerned.

Eternal years have passed, and before you know it, three million eternal years.

Ye Tian's cultivation still hasn't changed, but his willpower and willpower are all improving, and more Eternal Dao has been raised to the legendary level.

In addition, his attainments in time are even more prosperous, and he is closer to completely controlling time.

On this day, there was good news from the Truly Unholy Land.

The first half-step Legendary Realm Lord of the True Immortal Holy Land, recognized as the strongest in the Half-Step Legendary Realm, surpassed the original Immortal 137 Frost Lord in terms of strength, and could be called the invincible Lord of Baiheng.

The strength of the Lord of Baiheng is much stronger than that of the Lord of Frostless, and he is the most mysterious and oldest half-step Legendary Realm Lord of the True Immortal Land, and it is time that he has attained.

However, it is too difficult to become a Legendary Realm Lord, even the Lord of Baiheng is still a little slow in controlling time, so he has not broken through.

Now, the Bridge of Time has been built in the True Void Holy Land, so Lord Baiheng has entered the long river of time penance, and finally broke the last bit of shackles and successfully controlled time.

Therefore, Lord Baiheng can impact the realm of the Lord of the Legendary Realm at any time.

It hasn't been long since the Frostless Lord has become the Lord of the Legendary Realm, and the True Saintless Land is about to give birth to another Lord of the Legendary Realm, which makes the other forces shocked and jealous at the same time.

"Could it be that the Frostless Lord is talking about the fact that the Baiheng Lord has broken through to the Legendary Realm Lord? No, it shouldn't be this, it has nothing to do with the Kuhai Gravel. Ye Tian said darkly.

However, he felt that after Lord Baiheng broke through, he was afraid that he would be very close to what Lord Frostless said.

Therefore, he waited in silence.

And not long after, Lord Baiheng was about to enter the realm of the Lord of the Legendary Realm of the Long River of Time. _
